text_original: If we could renounce our sageness and discard our wisdom, it would be better for the people a hundredfold.
text_normalized: If we could renounce our sageness and discard our wisdom, it would be better for the people a hundredfold.

text_original: If we could renounce our benevolence and discard our righteousness, the people would again become filial and kindly.
text_normalized: If we could renounce our benevolence and discard our righteousness, the people would again become filial and kindly.

text_original: If we could renounce our artful contrivances and discard our (scheming for) gain, there would be no thieves nor robbers.
text_normalized: If we could renounce our artful contrivances and discard our (scheming for) gain, there would be no thieves nor robbers.

text_original: Thought olden ways in elegance did fail
text_normalized: Thought olden ways in elegance did fail

text_original: And made these names their want of worth to veil;
text_normalized: And made these names their want of worth to veil;

text_original: But simple views, and courses plain and true
text_normalized: But simple views, and courses plain and true

text_original: Would selfish ends and many lusts eschew.
text_normalized: Would selfish ends and many lusts eschew.
